title: Create Astra Fabric [OUTDATED]
description: Addon for compatibility Create and Ad Astra
body:
# Create Astra Fabric [OUTDATED]

# That project is outdated. Use [Create Air Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-air-fabric)
------
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1169615451291140146?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=%23ffffff&labelColor=%23002244&color=%23003366)](https://discord.gg/gBB8uRJA8g)
[![Gitea](https://img.shields.io/badge/gitea-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=gitea&labelColor=%23002244&color=%23003366)](https://git.bitheaven.ru/BitHeaven/create-astra-fabric)

Addon for compatibility Create Fabric and Ad Astra

On planets without oxygen using oxygen from backtank. Hot planets safe with netherite equipment.
